diffs.diff:
--- a/_inspect_renderer.py
+++ b/_inspect_renderer.py
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+import sys, os

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+from tsr.models.nerf_renderer import NeuSRenderer

+import inspect

+

+# Write to file instead of stdout to avoid clutter

+out = open('_renderer_info.txt', 'w')

+

+model = TSR.from_pretrained('checkpoints/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')

+out.write(f'Renderer type: {type(model.renderer)}\n')

+out.write(f'Renderer attributes: {dir(model.renderer)}\n\n')

+

+# Print source of render method in system

+out.write('=== TSR.render source ===\n')

+out.write(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

+out.write('\n\n=== NeuSRenderer source ===\n')

+try:

+    out.write(inspect.getsource(NeuSRenderer))

+except:

+    out.write('Could not get source')

+

+# Try to determine default camera generation

+out.write('\n=== NeuSRenderer methods ===\n')

+for name, method in inspect.getmembers(model.renderer, predicate=inspect.ismethod):

+    out.write(f'{name}: {inspect.signature(method)}\n')

+

+out.close()

+print('Renderer info written to _renderer_info.txt')
